# Card

A container component for grouping related content and actions in a visually distinct section.

## Import

```jsx
import { Card } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `Card` | The root card container. |
| `Card.Header` | The header section of the card. |
| `Card.Body` | The main content area of the card. |
| `Card.Footer` | The footer section, typically for actions. |
| `Card.Title` | The title text within the card. |
| `Card.Description` | A description or subtitle text within the card. |

## Props

### Card

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"elevated" \| "outline" \| "subtle"` | `"outline"` | The visual style variant of the card. |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the card, affecting padding and spacing. |

## Usage

### Basic Card

```jsx
<Card>
  <Card.Header>
    <Card.Title>Card Title</Card.Title>
    <Card.Description>Card description goes here.</Card.Description>
  </Card.Header>
  <Card.Body>
    <p>This is the main content of the card.</p>
  </Card.Body>
  <Card.Footer>
    <Button>Action</Button>
  </Card.Footer>
</Card>
```

### Card Variants

```jsx
<Card variant="elevated">
  <Card.Body>Elevated card with shadow</Card.Body>
</Card>

<Card variant="outline">
  <Card.Body>Outlined card with border</Card.Body>
</Card>

<Card variant="subtle">
  <Card.Body>Subtle card with background</Card.Body>
</Card>
```

### Compact Card

```jsx
<Card size="sm">
  <Card.Body>
    <Card.Title>Compact Card</Card.Title>
    <p>Smaller padding for dense layouts.</p>
  </Card.Body>
</Card>
```
